explanation: This command uses NSudo to execute cmd.exe with System privileges and all privileges enabled, matching the Sigma rule's detection criteria.
This command uses equivalent syntax (= instead of : for parameter assignment) to achieve the same behavior as the first command, matching the Sigma rule.
This command includes additional flags (-M:H for High Integrity and -ShowWindowMode:Hide) while still matching the Sigma rule's detection criteria.
This command uses NSudo to execute cmd.exe with Elevated privileges and all privileges enabled, matching the Sigma rule's detection criteria.
This command includes additional flags (-M:S for System Integrity) while still matching the Sigma rule's detection criteria.
